segments.speaker: Member
segments.text: Hi, I don't think we've met. I'm Michael.

segments.speaker: You
segments.text: Nice to meet you. I'm Jongkuk. Today's my first Sunday here.

segments.speaker: Member
segments.text: Welcome. Are you new to Boston?

segments.speaker: You
segments.text: Yes, I arrived recently to start a PhD program in architecture.

segments.speaker: You
segments.text: Slowly, but I'm grateful. I'm figuring out housing, campus, food, all the basics.

segments.speaker: Member
segments.text: That's a lot to carry at once.

segments.speaker: You
segments.text: It is. I'm trying to build community before I get buried in schoolwork.

segments.speaker: Member
segments.text: Good instinct. We have small groups during the week if you're interested.

segments.speaker: You
segments.text: I am, but I may need something low-pressure at first.

segments.speaker: Member
segments.text: Totally. I can introduce you to the group coordinator.

segments.speaker: You
segments.text: That would be great. Thank you.
